description: Create a content slide with the headline about top 5 luxury brands accounting for ~50% of sales, using a full-width vertical bar chart of 2010 China domestic luxury spend by category with top-5 brand labels inside each bar.

header.headline: In each luxury category, the top 5 brands account for ~50% of sales
header.sub: 2010 China domestic luxury spend (RMB B)    Total = RMB 87B

main.title: Top 5 brands by category in alphabetical order

footer.source: Note: Market value is composed of sales at retail value; "Other" category includes tableware/silverware, stationery, sunglasses, accessories and other niche luxury goods items; "Leather goods" includes smaller items such as wallets; ranking of luxury brands is in alphabetical order; Armani brand includes Giorgio Armani, Emporio Armani and Armani Collezioni. Source: Expert interviews; Brand interviews; Analyst reports; Company websites and reports; Literature search; Bain analysis
